form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently 2nd in a small field at this track on March 9 over 1500m, on rain affected going; 8 len behind Treasure Cartier with 56kg at $4.10. The start before that 2nd of 7 at this track on January 12 over 1500m, nose behind Na Corda Bamba carrying 56kg at $2.20. This is well within her grasp.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of ten weeks. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at this track February 2 over 1400m, on rain affected going; 18 len behind Glory Dany with 59kg at $4.70. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.3 len this track November 17 over 1500m defeating Marron Five with 57kg at $2.60. Winning hope.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of ten weeks. form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign when last of 8 at this track November 10 over 1300m, 26 len behind On My Side with 56kg at $14.10. First up last campaign third of 7 at Cidade Jardim May 4 over 1600m, a 0.3 lengths behind Nascar Race carrying 55kg at $14.10. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: Returns from a 36-day let-up. Last start 6th of 9 at this track in the G3 Professor Nova Monteiro on March 8 over 1900m, 15 len behind Obvio with 59kg at $28.40. Before that 4th of 8 at this track on February 9 over 1400m, 13 len behind Just Jump with 59kg at $2.70. Can turn things around.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 3rd of 7 at this track on March 30 over 1500m, 3.5 len behind Orwellian carrying 54kg at $9.30. form.formComment: Comes off a 29 day let-up. At the latest run in a small field at this track on March 15 over 1200m, 0.3 len behind Otoniel with 56kg at $9.90. Before that 4th of 10 at this track on February 23 over 1500m, 5 len behind Maverick carrying 56kg at $54.40. Will need to lift.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Only had one start last campaign ran last of 16 at this track in the G1 Gran Premio Brasil on June 23 2024 over 2400m, 20 len behind Obataye carrying 58kg at $20.30. When resuming last campaign 3rd of 9 at this track in the G2 Antonio Joaquim Peixoto de Castro Jr. On April 7 2024 over 2400m, 3.5 len behind Limeira with 58kg at $16.30. Can return in winning form.
